top_signals.title: Australia vows stronger ties with Solomon Islands amid China concerns
top_signals.summary: China on Monday test-fired an intercontinental ballistic missile from a nuclear-powered submarine ⁠in the Pacific, its first test since 2024.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: A Token Grasp of the AI Boom Shows Trouble Brewing
top_signals.summary: The period of vertical ascent is probably over.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘Too much tax, too much regulation’: Fintech chief sounds alarm on UK economy and IPO market
top_signals.summary: The boss of one of the UK’s fastest-growing fintech unicorns has warned the country risks “putting founders off” with overregulation and heavy taxation as speculation rises that the Labour government could make a major lurch to the left. Paul Taylor, who founded banking software firm Thought Machine in 2014, told City AM he feared UK [...]

top_signals.title: SailGP: The $100m-per-team sailing league looking to join British summer of sport
top_signals.summary: With SailGP back on these shores later this month, how is the league going about becoming a staple of the British summer? The British summer of sport is an extraordinary thing; Henley, Wimbledon, the Boat Race, Queen’s, Test cricket, The Open, Prem Rugby’s final, the British Grand Prix and more. But there is another sport [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Brits say Burnham should call an election
top_signals.summary: Sir Keir Starmer is set to leave Downing Street on 20 July and a majority of Brits believe Andy Burnham should call a snap election when he takes over. Nearly two thirds of voters (65 per cent) believe a new Prime Minister should call an immediate general election as opposed to 29 per cent who [...]

top_signals.title: Osaka trumps Tokyo as both ranked among world’s top 10 most livable cities
top_signals.summary: Osaka ranked seventh, while Tokyo, which improved its culture and environment score, moved up three places to reach 10th.

top_signals.title: Belgium ends U.S. World Cup dreams with 4-1 rout amid Balogun row
top_signals.summary: Charles De Ketelaere gave Belgium the lead in the ninth minute with a simple tap-in, ​taking full advantage of a nervous start by the U.S. to quickly deflate the partisan crowd.
